_comment: Single source of truth for Florence Academy partner-outreach copy. Read by mailpiece.ts. Edit here; both postcard and letter stay in sync. Value + activation only. No FICA / visa / tax / immigration language. No italics, no em-dashes. {school} and {country} are filled per target.

front.head_quote: Your alumni already train other nurses. Help them get their U.S. RN faster.
front.sub_quote: Florence Academy is the live NCLEX-RN bootcamp for internationally educated nurses. Alumni of {school} get 25 percent off the seat deposit.
front.head_market: Your nursing alumni deserve a bootcamp built for them.
front.sub_market: Florence Academy runs the live NCLEX-RN program for internationally educated nurses globally online and in Los Angeles. Alumni of {school} qualify for our preferred 25 percent partner rate.

for_alumni.label: For your alumni
for_alumni.body: 25 percent off the seat deposit for the live cohort. Same bootcamp, same instructors, same outcomes track. Lower price, because we trust your credential.

for_school.label: For your nursing department
for_school.body: Access to an anonymized dashboard of how your alumni perform in the bootcamp. Readiness trend, NCLEX pass rate, peer comparison to other schools in our partner network. K-anonymized to protect any single student.

phase_two.label: Coming next
phase_two.body: Partner schools get first access to our branded computer lab and VR patient simulation platform for their on-campus students.

letter.head_quote: Your alumni already train other nurses. Help them get their U.S. RN faster.
letter.head_market: Your nursing alumni deserve a bootcamp built for them.
paragraphs_quote: Florence Academy is the live NCLEX-RN bootcamp for internationally educated nurses. We teach twenty live sections in order, between sessions students train on a content-balanced bank built to the 2026 NCSBN test plan, and our readiness model tells them when they are ready, not before.

We are inviting {school} to join our partner network. The ask is small. Alumni of {school} get 25 percent off the seat deposit for the live cohort. Same bootcamp, same instructors, same outcomes track. Lower price, because we trust your credential.

Your nursing department receives access to an anonymized dashboard of how your alumni perform in our program. Readiness trend, NCLEX pass rate, peer comparison to other schools in our partner network. The dashboard is K-anonymized to protect any single student.
paragraphs_market: Florence Academy runs the live NCLEX-RN program for internationally educated nurses globally online and in Los Angeles. We teach twenty live sections in order, students train every night on a content-balanced bank built to the 2026 NCSBN test plan, and our readiness model tells them when they are ready to sit the exam.

We are inviting {school} to join our partner network. The ask is small. Alumni of {school} qualify for our preferred 25 percent partner rate on the seat deposit for the live cohort. Same bootcamp, same instructors, same outcomes track. Lower price, because we trust your credential.

Your nursing department receives access to an anonymized dashboard of how your alumni perform in our program. Readiness trend, NCLEX pass rate, peer comparison to other schools in our partner network. The dashboard is K-anonymized to protect any single student.
closing_paragraphs: Coming next: partner schools get first access to our branded computer lab and VR patient simulation platform for their on-campus students. We will reach out separately when that is ready.
Activate the partnership at the URL below. The code is unique to {school}; one click confirms you and unlocks the dashboard.

_notes.tone: Practical, not salesy. Specifics over superlatives. We name the thing we are offering and the thing we are asking for; nothing else.
_notes.audience: Dean of Nursing or alumni-affairs director at a school with 20+ alumni already in our pipeline.
